title: Amethyst Handles
description: Turns diamond tool handles into amethyst rods.
body:
Replaces all diamond tool handles to amethyst rods.

![Diamond Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/736acca0a38a1b6b89be92df07964fe5bbd62dac.png)

![Diamond Shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ba31d18a656810103433440e6b5a0d92a11787b.png)
